programme.title: Innerspace
programme.desc: A test pilot is miniaturized in a secret experiment and accidentally injected into a hapless store clerk

programme.title: Rescue from Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The castaways must try to readjust to life in civilization after they are rescued from the island

programme.title: License to Drive
programme.desc: A teen decides to go for a night on the town with his friends despite A teen decides to go for a night on the town with his friends despite flunking his drivers test

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: TBH 110
programme.desc: TBH 110

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Unknown to everyone in the valley two young men - opinionated Arthur Gilroy and his friend Lowell Rightmeyer who does whatever Arthur says - both strangers to the valley are on their way to rob the bank in Pixley They change their plans when they learn that the next day the Cannonball without any armed guards will make its express run from Hooterville to Pixley for the bank shipment Arthur and Lowell decide to stay the night at the Shady Rest and stop the train the next day by placing a barricade on the tracks so that they can hold it up Kate and the family are happy to have who they see as two polite and handsome young men stay with them However when Arthur and Lowell do hold up the train the next day they are unprepared for Kate and Uncle Joe also being on the train they who recognize the masked bandits In combination with news from Floyd and learning what is in the bank shipment Arthur and Lowell decide to make what they consider a more lucrative robbery at the Shady Rest instead But will the down home attitude of Kate her family and Charley and Floyd be able to turn around Arthur and Lowells criminal lives

programme.title: Munsters 138
programme.desc: Munsters 138

programme.title: Addams Family 105
programme.desc: Addams Family 105

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Tennis pro Maureen Mitchell Brenda Benet runs into sportswriter John Ballard Bill Bixby who defamed her in his column Cyril Wolfe Milton Berle annoys his wife Anita Audra Lindley and fellow passengers Lynn Adams and Britt Leach with constant practical jokes Mexican April Lopez Charo stows away in a laundry hamper

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: Freddy goes after a Springwood teenager whos stuck working at a burger joint owned by his father

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A psychic clown and part-time cook who abuses his assistant and wife learns that she is having an affair with a fire eater and plans to runs off with him

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A hot-tempered convict with a butter addiction tries to get revenge with the help of his mentally challenged brother on the ice cream trucker who was responsible for his arrest unaware the driver also has a dark secret too

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Self-centered yuppie lawyer Ted Miller reunites with Melody a former flame who clings to her 60s hippie ideals He lets her stay at his apartment but she sees that he sold out his youthful beliefs in favor of greed and materialism

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Desperate transgender woman Nina Russell hires prominent sleazy arrogant plastic surgeon Dr Christopher Hamilton to create an attractive face for her He operates on her after a night of drugging when he is unfit to hold a scalpel

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: On Halloween Eric sees the pentagram appear on his hand and knows his transformation into a werewolf is imminent He locks himself in an abandoned house not realizing that a disfigured recluse still lives there

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: A rancher comes after Eric when he befriends a she-wolf who earlier had attacked the rancher for killing her wolf pups

programme.desc: Knight 301

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Jack tries to rescue Ryan and Micki when theyre locked in a vault with a mystic urn that conjures up torturous nightmares

programme.desc: Teenage Halloween pranksters Shari Belafonte-Harper LeVar Burton Lee Montgomery revive a 300-year-old witch and some of her ghoul friends

programme.title: Mchale 230
programme.desc: Mchale 230

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Sgt Carter tries to make Gomer dislike him before graduation feeling that he hasnt done his job correctly if he isnt hated by ALL the recruits Sgt Carter asks for a transfer to California but things dont go quite as he expects

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Its Survival Training for the platoon two-man teams must rough it for five days Thinking Gomer will bring down the platoons rating Sgt Carter takes him for his partner Gomers small-town backwoods upbringing turns out to be an asset

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Wrongway Feldman returns to the island not to rescue the castaways but to make the island his permanent home As a result the castaways try to trick him into returning to Hawaii and rescuing them

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The castaways form a band for entertainment and diversion But Gilligans drumbeats are mistaken by tribes on other islands as a declaration of war

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: KAOS impersonators are running around causing chaos in CONTROL

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Max and 99 go to a South American country dressed as flamenco dancers to save the President of the country

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: BJ is hired by a lady to transport to Washington DC a deadly virus that she stole so she can present it to Congress as proof that her company is conducting highly illegal and potentially lethal research

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: After Ed starts giving Wilbur nothing but winning picks at the race track everyone wants to get in on the gravy train - including Carol and Kays milk fund for the school kids

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Ed writes and sings a song that is destined to become a hit record Of course Wilbur must pretend that its all him and not Ed

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Klink helps an old friend by assisting Hogan in the theft of the plans for an assassination on the Fuehrer

programme.title: Hogans Heroes

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: Neron captures the Herculoids to fight gladiatorial battles in his arenaThe Temple of Trax seems to be abandoned In reality the high priest has a plan to kidnap Tara and sacrifice her for the return of Trax after 2000 years

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Quimbys new super computer replaces Gadget leaving him to pursue an alternative career

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Quimby suspects that MAD are planning to steal a precious formula that could end world famine

programme.title: Attack Force Z
programme.desc: During World War II a top-secret Australian attack unit penetrates Japanese lines to perform a daring rescue mission to rescue the American crew of a crashed plane

programme.title: Love Boat

programme.title: Cheerleader Camp
programme.desc: A cheerleader Betsy Russell her boyfriend Leif Garrett colleagues and a team mascot Lucinda Dickey attend a competition spoiled by murder

programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Hazzard Jail is the meeting place for Black Jack Bender and a group of syndicate kingpins who are conspiring to smuggle illegal weapons in the area Bo and Luke - with a little help from Uncle Jesse Daisy and their friends Cletus and Cooter - use some good ol southern smarts to keep the mobsters at bay until the FBI can arrive to investigate

programme.title: Hercules 107
programme.desc: Hercules 107

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Strange assaults and several deaths may be related to a DoorsTaelon joint venture where Taelon core energy was used to heal people It appears that the energy is being sucked back out of the patients

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: War of the Worlds

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Swamp Thing gifts the chance to make things right to three criminals who break out of Houma Prison

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: On a planned de-stressing holiday Arcane is attacked by an old enemy who is supposed to be locked away in an asylum But LaRoche is a master of hypnotism and forces unlikely allies to help him

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: The Alphans joy turns to horror when the first child born on the Alpha matures into a five year old in a matter of hours This is only a prelude to the arrival of formless alien fugitives- who plan to inhabit Alphas population

programme.title: Attack of the Giant Leaches
programme.desc: Fear grips a nondescript city after its residents disappear mysteriously from across the town Surprisingly a gamekeeper stumbles upon the role of blood-sucking leeches behind the disappearances

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: Heath risks his life and saves a man who is a notorious hired gunman The irony is the killer has a contract to kill Heath put out by a local rancher with a grudge

programme.desc: Chey 501

programme.title: Young Riders
programme.desc: Young Riders

programme.title: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years
programme.desc: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A terminally ill circus rigger is killed in his hospital bed by someone made up as a clown At first the detectives suspect the victims brother may have done it as a mercy killing but when the brother is murdered as well suspicion shifts to the nephew of the two men

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: Phelps Co continue their plan to smash the renegade slavery operation of the absolute ruler of a Middle Eastern nation Phelps posing as a slave trader works his way into the confidence of the ruler In that role Phelps sells Cinnamon into slavery Meanwhile the rest of the IMF team is preparing to pull a switch that will force the rulers brother to confront the situation and force the end of slavery in his nation

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon are working day watch and must go to the hospital when a veteran police officer and his young partner are seriously wounded in a liquor store holdup where they deal with very different reactions of the wives

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: The detectives investigate an especially creepy college freshman suspected of the sniper-rifle deaths of two people for no apparent reason other than the sport of killing

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: Audra falls for a dashing but ruthless financier who has maneuvered many of the ranchers into taking out risky loans with him during a drought with the intention of potentially foreclosing on their land

programme.title: The Gladiator
programme.desc: A homicidal maniac is on the loose in Los Angeles killing motorists at random with his death car After losing his brother Jeff to the twisted assassin known as Skull Rick Benton takes it upon himself to hunt down the reckless drivers that fill the streets at night Being a master mechanic Rick spends his time converting his pick-up truck into an armed and dangerous vehicle With speed to take on the fastest car and strength to make sure in a one-on-one situation he will be the only survivor The cops soon find out about the vigilante known only as the Gladiator and do all they can to catch him before his citizens arrests go one step too far

programme.title: No Retreat No Surrender
programme.desc: After his father is abused by some thugs a teenager considers Bruce Lees spirit as his teacher Later he trains to become a martial arts professional to avenge his fathers humiliation

programme.title: American Flyers
programme.desc: Marcus takes his kid brother David with him for a physical test and a brain scan suspecting cerebral aneurysm like their dad died of They head off on bikes for the big Rockies bike race with Marcus Sarah driving the van

programme.title: Escape Planet of the Apes
programme.desc: Three apes travel back in time after Earths destruction and land on earth in the 70s They acquire celebrity status after revealing that they can talk but things take a turn for the worse soon

programme.title: Gamera Vs Barugon War Of The Monsters
programme.desc: After a treacherous expedition to retrieve a giant opal disaster strikes as the opal reveals itself to be an egg which spawns Barugon demon dog from Hell! Armed with a deadly tongue and cold beams Barugon wreaks havoc on Japan Gamera comes to save the day

programme.desc: Tyrannical but ailing tycoon Charles Richmond becomes very fond of his attractive Italian nurse Maria The nurse in turn falls in love with Charles neer-do-well nephew Anthony who plots ways to gain control of his uncles fortune
